title: Xenial Yeasty Slovakian Cannellini Beans Casserole
description: A traditional Slovakian dish featuring cannellini beans in a yeasty sauce, perfect for a solo dinner, this recipe is egg-free-friendly and cooked to perfection on a salt block.
instructions: Preheat the salt block in the oven at 375 degrees Fahrenheit for 30 minutes.
In a large bowl, combine the cannellini beans, yeast, olive oil, onion, garlic, caraway seeds, paprika, salt, and black pepper, and mix well.
Add the water to the bowl and stir until the mixture is well combined.
Remove the salt block from the oven and carefully place the bean mixture on it.
Return the salt block to the oven and bake for 35 minutes.
Remove the casserole from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes.
Serve the Xenial Yeasty Slovakian Cannellini Beans Casserole hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley if desired.
